The sixth season of ‚ÄòGot Talent Spain‚Äô will surprise you with hundreds of exciting and fun performances that will be judged by a fun and demanding jury. Risto Mejide, the singer Edurne and the humorist Dani Mart√≠nez repeat on the program to assess all the numbers and decide who should or shouldn‚Äôt go to the next stage of the selection of the Telecinco talent show, which returns stronger than ever. 

There are many participants who will fight to fulfill their dream on the stage of the show after a confinement that has changed everything and which it as shown that there is still a lot of talent to discover. Many of those stories are important in these performances that it is impossible not to get excited about. 

Singer with songs that you will love, spectacular group dance numbers that will impress you, surprising magic tricks that are impossible to discover, comedians with whom you will not stop laughing, children with unimaginable talents or athletes who turn their discipline into a talent. They are part of this edition of the talent show and everyone will fight to win the Golden Pass of the jury and Santi Mill√°n. But getting it will not be easy. 

Get ready to get excited, to laugh like never before and to vibrate with these numbers. Get ready to accompany our participant on what will be the most special trip of their lives. You join?

snippet.title: MAN UNITED 3-3 EVERTON | PREMIER LEAGUE HIGHLIGHTS
snippet.description:
Dominic Calvert-Lewin rescued a late point for Everton at Old Trafford to make it seven away games without defeat. Carlo Ancelotti's side found themselves 2-0 down at half-time via goals from Edinson Cavani and Bruno Fernandes, but Abdoulaye Doucour√© and James Rodriguez struck after the break. Scott McTominay thought he'd won it for Manchester United, until Calvert-Lewin steered home his 13th Premier League goal of the season in the 95th minute.

Rochy RD re√∫ne a Myke Towers y a Nicki Nicole en el remix de ‚ÄúElla No Es Tuya‚Äù

Alexandra Hatcu es la protagonista del video clip oficial .

El rapero Rochy RD re√∫ne en el remix de √©xito ‚ÄúElla no es tuya‚Äù a Myke Towers, uno de los artistas puertorrique√±os m√°s pegados del momento y a la joven superestrella de Argentina, Nicki Nicole. 

El junte que sali√≥ a la luz este 3 de febrero, es la primera colaboraci√≥n de Nicki,  denominada por muchos como ‚Äúla princesa del trap argentino‚Äù, con un artista dominicano. Towers, por su parte, ya habr√≠a colaborado con Rochy en el remix del hit ‚ÄúLa M√°xima‚Äù.

La protagonista del videoclip oficial del remix de ‚ÄúElla no es tuya‚Äù es la popular Instagramer Alexandra Hatcu, siendo esta la primera aparici√≥n de la modelo en un audiovisual del g√©nero urbano. 

La producci√≥n del tema se realiz√≥ bajo la colaboraci√≥n entre las disqueras Vulcano Music Entertainment con Sony Music Latin. 

La versi√≥n original de ‚ÄúElla no es tuya‚Äù acaba de convertirse en disco de oro en Estados Unidos y ya cuenta con 3 millones de reproducciones en la plataforma de m√∫sica digital Spotify y su videoclip sobrepasa los 40 millones de reproducciones en Youtube. 

Rochy RD manifest√≥: ‚ÄúEl tema se convirti√≥ en un √©xito porque mucha gente de las redes sociales lo dedican a manera de broma a todos aquellos hombres que cre√≠an que su pareja era exclusiva de ellos, y no era as√≠, por eso nadie duda que al tema le queda mucho tiempo de vigencia‚Äù, concluy√≥. 

Gratitud

El rapero nativo del barrio Los Frailes, en agradecimiento a Vulcano Music, disquera dirigida por JC Restituyo (Aka Creador), se tatu√≥ el logo de la compa√±√≠a por haber confiado en su talento y guiarlo dentro de la creciente industria musical tanto nacional como internacionalmente.

Rochy RD manifest√≥: ‚ÄúEl tema se convirti√≥ en un √©xito porque mucha gente de las redes sociales lo dedican a manera de broma a todos aquellos hombres que cre√≠an que su pareja era exclusiva de ellos, y no era as√≠, por eso nadie duda que al tema le queda mucho tiempo de vigencia‚Äù, concluy√≥. 

Gratitud

El rapero nativo del barrio Los Frailes, en agradecimiento a Vulcano Music, disquera dirigida por JC Restituyo (Aka Creador), se tatu√≥ el logo de la compa√±√≠a por haber confiado en su talento y guiarlo dentro de la creciente industria musical tanto nacional como internacionalmente.

snippet.title: Fernando de Noronha, la isla en la que est√° prohibido nacer
snippet.description:
Fernando de Noronha es un archipi√©lago brasile√±o ubicado a m√°s de 300 kil√≥metros de la costa. Por la belleza del entorno y las posibilidades para bucear, fue considerada por un sitio especializado como la mejor playa del mundo en los √∫ltimos dos a√±os. 

Sin embargo, cuenta con dos regulaciones muy extra√±as. No hay propiedad de la tierra y tampoco hay hospitales con sala de parto. Por eso es que las embarazadas deben trasladarse al continente a partir de la semana 34. 

Adem√°s, el recuerdo del vuelo 447 de Air France y un repaso por las islas a√∫n m√°s alejadas que posee Brasil en el Atl√°ntico.

en.title: Fernando de Noronha, the island where it is forbidden to be born
en.description:
Fernando de Noronha is a Brazilian archipelago located more than 300 kilometers from the coast. Due to the beauty of the environment and the possibilities for diving, it was considered by a specialized site as the best beach in the world in the last two years.

However, it has two very strange regulations. There is no land ownership and there are no hospitals with a delivery room. That is why pregnant women must move to the continent from week 34.

In addition, the memory of Air France flight 447 and a review of the even more remote islands that Brazil has in the Atlantic.

üåé Un Mundo Inmenso
Singularities of our planet.

snippet.title: Starship | SN9 | High-Altitude Flight Test
snippet.description:
On Tuesday, February 2, Starship serial number 9 (SN9) completed SpaceX‚Äôs second high-altitude flight test of a Starship prototype from our site in Cameron County, Texas.

Similar to the high-altitude flight test of Starship serial number 8 (SN8), SN9 was powered through ascent by three Raptor engines, each shutting down in sequence prior to the vehicle reaching apogee ‚Äì approximately 10 kilometers in altitude. SN9 successfully performed a propellant transition to the internal header tanks, which hold landing propellant, before reorienting itself for reentry and a controlled aerodynamic descent.

The Starship prototype descended under active aerodynamic control, accomplished by independent movement of two forward and two aft flaps on the vehicle. All four flaps are actuated by an onboard flight computer to control Starship‚Äôs attitude during flight and enable precise landing at the intended location. During the landing flip maneuver, one of the Raptor engines did not relight and caused SN9 to land at high speed and experience a RUD.

These test flights are all about improving our understanding and development of a fully reusable transportation system designed to carry both crew and cargo on long-duration, interplanetary flights and help humanity return to the Moon, and travel to Mars and beyond.

"Billie Eilish: The World‚Äôs A Little Blurry‚Äù tells the true coming-of-age story of the singer-songwriter and her rise to global superstardom. From award-winning filmmaker R.J. Cutler, the documentary offers a deeply intimate look at this extraordinary teenager‚Äôs journey, at just seventeen years old, navigating life on the road, on stage, and at home with her family, while writing, recording and releasing her debut album ‚ÄúWHEN WE ALL FALL ASLEEP, WHERE DO WE GO?‚Äù

[Redimi2]
//Quita y pon//

El coraz√≥n parti¬¥o se√±orita

Estoy seguro de que sabe lo que quiere
Pero no sabe lo que necesita
Mercedes te dir√© lo que sucede
A tu coraz√≥n cualquiera accede

Y as√≠ no se puede
Gu√°rdalo en cuatro paredes
Y pon de guardi√°n
Al que todo lo puede

Tu coraz√≥n no es de cart√≥n
Quita la emoci√≥n pon la raz√≥n
Olvida la traici√≥n dale borr√≥n
Al var√≥n chulet√≥n

Quita todo lo que te envenene y que te frene
Ponle stoped a lo que de Dios no viene
Quita el contacto que no te conviene
Pon la vista en Cristo que te sostiene

Quita todo lo que no edifica
Pon protecci√≥n al coraz√≥n
Quita al grupito que te perjudica
Y ponle volumen a esta canci√≥n

[Funky]
//Quita y pon//

[Alex Zurdo]
Quita y pon, quita lo malo don
Te da√±a el coraz√≥n y ponle asunto a lo bueno
Quita y pon, quita lo malo don
Te da√±a el coraz√≥n y pon a Dios que √âl es bueno

Cu√≠date de lo que el ojo ve
David por la ‚Äúwindow‚Äù esta Betzab√©
Te cautiva el color de su tez 
Y despu√©s todo sale al rev√©s

Si te descuida en la movida
Por estar mirando una fruta prohibida
Y se entera el due√±o de su amor
Ser√° como recta pa¬¥l bateador

//M√°s ni√±o que t√∫ analizo
Y me voy de rodilla pal piso
Al diablo ya qu√≠tale el guiso
Demu√©strale quien te hizo//

Quita lo que t√∫ no necesitas
Pon gozo pa¬¥ tu coraz√≥n
Qu√≠tale el ojo a la vecinita
Y ponle volumen a esta canci√≥n

[Funky]
//Quita y pon//

Yo ya te dije que no te enredaras en las redes
Que por estar siempre escondido esto es lo que sucede

Pues se ahoga y no tiene balsa
Solamente una cuenta falsa
Que es de donde manda la salsa
Pa¬¥ ver como el morbo realza

Respira y no revive
Pendiente a lo que el mundo escribe
Con lupa como detective
T√∫ muerto aunque Carlos vive

//M√°s ni√±o que t√∫ analizo
Y me voy de rodilla pal piso
Al diablo ya qu√≠tale el guiso
Demu√©strale quien te hizo//

Quita por estar tirando pullita
Pon atenci√≥n a la intenci√≥n
Quita el deseo de tus orejitas
Ponle volumen a esta canci√≥n

//Quita y pon//

[Peter Metivier]
Dale quita y pon, pon
Patea de home round
Quita la dura amargura
Y pon la fin "action"
En Cristo tengo la armadura 
Ya no cojo presi√≥n
Cuando el pecado llam√≥
Yo lo mande al buz√≥n

T√∫ no perteneces a este mundo incompleto
Aunque parezcas Pinocho y el mundo Gepetto
Aqu√≠ traje salvaci√≥n pa¬¥ llenar ese hueco
Quita lo malo y pon lo bueno te reto

Que el mundo te tiene roto en part√≠cula
Comi√©ndote las u√±as y las cut√≠culas

Pon, quita y pon bota la presi√≥n
Y sigue este son que tiene el saz√≥n
Pa¬¥ tu vida de saber pa¬¥ tu coraz√≥n
Pon lo bueno en acci√≥n y quita

Quita todo lo malo que en tu vida no edifica
Y ponle asunto a lo bueno

[Funky]
//Quita y pon//

en.title: A COLOMBIAN and a URUGUAYAN sweep their dance | Auditions 3 | Spain's Got Talent 2021
en.description:
The sixth season of ‚ÄòGot Talent Spain‚Äô will surprise you with hundreds of exciting and fun performances that will be judged by a fun and demanding jury. Risto Mejide, the singer Edurne and the humorist Dani Mart√≠nez repeat on the program to assess all the numbers and decide who should or shouldn‚Äôt go to the next stage of the selection of the Telecinco talent show, which returns stronger than ever. 

There are many participants who will fight to fulfill their dream on the stage of the show after a confinement that has changed everything and which it as shown that there is still a lot of talent to discover. Many of those stories are important in these performances that it is impossible not to get excited about. 

Singer with songs that you will love, spectacular group dance numbers that will impress you, surprising magic tricks that are impossible to discover, comedians with whom you will not stop laughing, children with unimaginable talents or athletes who turn their discipline into a talent. They are part of this edition of the talent show and everyone will fight to win the Golden Pass of the jury and Santi Mill√°n. But getting it will not be easy. 

Get ready to get excited, to laugh like never before and to vibrate with these numbers. Get ready to accompany our participant on what will be the most special trip of their lives. You join?

Welcome to the official channel of ‚ÄòGot Talent Spain‚Äô!

en.title: A boy from NEPAL abandoned by his father THRILLS the jury | Auditions 3 | Spain's Got Talent 2021
en.description:
The sixth season of ‚ÄòGot Talent Spain‚Äô will surprise you with hundreds of exciting and fun performances that will be judged by a fun and demanding jury. Risto Mejide, the singer Edurne and the humorist Dani Mart√≠nez repeat on the program to assess all the numbers and decide who should or shouldn‚Äôt go to the next stage of the selection of the Telecinco talent show, which returns stronger than ever. 

There are many participants who will fight to fulfill their dream on the stage of the show after a confinement that has changed everything and which it as shown that there is still a lot of talent to discover. Many of those stories are important in these performances that it is impossible not to get excited about. 

Singer with songs that you will love, spectacular group dance numbers that will impress you, surprising magic tricks that are impossible to discover, comedians with whom you will not stop laughing, children with unimaginable talents or athletes who turn their discipline into a talent. They are part of this edition of the talent show and everyone will fight to win the Golden Pass of the jury and Santi Mill√°n. But getting it will not be easy. 

Get ready to get excited, to laugh like never before and to vibrate with these numbers. Get ready to accompany our participant on what will be the most special trip of their lives. You join?

Welcome to the official channel of ‚ÄòGot Talent Spain‚Äô!

Corden differentiates his show by offering viewers a peek behind-the-scenes into the green room, bringing all of his guests out at once and lending his musical and acting talents to various sketches. Additionally, bandleader Reggie Watts and the house band provide original, improvised music throughout the show. Since Corden took the reigns as host in March 2015, he has quickly become known for generating buzzworthy viral videos, such as Carpool Karaoke."

snippet.title: Story Teaser - Yakshas: The Guardian Adepti | Genshin Impact
snippet.description:
Alatus is the Golden-Winged King who is also the Conqueror of Demons. None knows whence he came, nor whither he went.
Only at springtime, during the offering of lanterns at night, might the people see the glow at Guyun and declare: "Behold, the Vigilant Yaksha ends the dominion of daemons!"
Or they might hear the sound of a flute amongst the marsh reeds, but find none who play the flute, and thus declare: "Hark, the yaksha calls to summon his old friends to their homeland."

Download FREE: https://genshin.mihoyo.com/en

id.title: Teaser Kisah: Yaksha, Sang Adeptus Pelindung | Genshin Impact
id.description:
Alatus ‚Äî Raja Bersayap Emas yang juga dijuluki Conqueror of Demons. Tidak ada yang mengetahui asal-usulnya, dan juga tidak ada yang mengetahui tujuan akhirnya.
Hanya pada malam musim semi, saat lentera-lentera diterbangkan, penduduk Liyue yang melihat ke arah Guyun akan berseru: "Lihat, Vigilant Yaksha sedang memburu para iblis!"
Atau mereka akan mendengar suara seruling dari rawa-rawa, tetapi saat dicari, tidak ada seorang pun di sana. Mereka pun akan berseru: "Para Yaksha sedang memanggil rekan-rekan lamanya kembali ke kampung halaman mereka."
